MaxLineLength:ExpenseDao.kt$ExpenseDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM expenses WHERE vendor LIKE '%' || :query || '%' OR notes LIKE '%' || :query || '%' ORDER BY date DESC")
MaxLineLength:ExpenseDao.kt$ExpenseDao$@Query("SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM expenses WHERE date BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate GROUP BY category")

MaxLineLength:GemmaModelManager.kt$GemmaModelManager$"Install a MediaPipe-compatible Gemma bundle (${supportedExtensions.joinToString()}) into secure app storage. For production, host the bundle and deliver it at runtime instead of packaging it in the APK."
MaxLineLength:GemmaService.kt$GemmaService$"No AI model is installed yet. Install a MediaPipe-compatible Gemma bundle (.litertlm, .task, .bin, or .tflite) to enable on-device intelligence."
MaxLineLength:GemmaService.kt$GemmaService$if (topCategory != null) append("Your biggest category was ${topCategory.key} at $percentage% of total spending. ")
MaxLineLength:PromptTemplates.kt$PromptTemplates$append("Parse this bank SMS and extract: vendor/payee name, amount (number only), date (YYYY-MM-DD), category.\n\n")
MaxLineLength:PromptTemplates.kt$PromptTemplates$append("Parse this email and extract: vendor name, total amount (number only), date (YYYY-MM-DD), category, items list.\n\n")
